# cameraDevice(_:didRemove:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the client when objects are removed from the device.

## Declaration

```swift
func cameraDevice(_ camera: ICCameraDevice, didRemove items: [ICCameraItem])
```

## Discussion

The objects in items are instances of the ICCameraFile class.

## Removing Objects

- **cameraDevice(_:didCompleteDeleteFilesWithError:)**: Tells the client when the camera completes a delete operation.
- **cameraDevice(_:didRemove:)**: Tells the client when an object is removed from the device.
